Incoming Call

Garden Design — £12k Project

PRIORITY

"Hello, you've reached Greenleaf Landscaping. I'm Katie, the digital assistant. How can I help?"

"I need a full garden redesign for my property in Surrey. About half an acre. Budget is around £15,000."

"That sounds wonderful. Can you confirm your postcode so I can get the right team to you?"

WhatsApp sent to landscaper in 2.8 seconds

The Real Cost of Missed Landscaping Calls

Every missed call is a job going to your competitor. Here's what landscapers lose every single week.

Spring Rush Overwhelms Your Phone

Landscaping enquiries are seasonal and weather-dependent. When spring hits, your phone rings off the hook. You're on a job site with muddy boots and can't answer. By the time you check, the customer has already called three other landscapers. You lost a £20,000 garden redesign.

44% of calls missed weekly

Commercial Clients Go to First Responder

An estate manager calls about a £4,000/month maintenance contract for a hotel grounds. You don't answer because you're laying patio slabs. They call competitor #2 who answers immediately. You lost £48,000 in annual recurring revenue.

78% hire first responder

Emergency Storm Damage Calls Unanswered

Storm hits overnight. A customer has a fallen tree blocking their driveway and dangerous branches near power lines. They call you at 6am. You're still asleep. They call the emergency tree service who answers immediately. You lost a £1,500 emergency job and a future repeat customer.

£8,000 avg redesign value

The average UK landscaper misses 8 calls per week = £76,800 in lost revenue per year

Source: UK SME Communications Survey 2025 — based on £8,000 avg redesign value, 35% conversion rate, seasonal adjustments

How Katie Works for Landscapers

Three simple steps from missed call to booked site visit. No apps to check. No dashboards to monitor.

01

Katie Answers Instantly

Customer calls your number. Katie picks up in under 2 rings with your branded greeting: 'Hello, Greenleaf Landscaping. I'm Katie, how can I help?' — 24/7, even during the spring rush.

02

She Captures Every Detail

Katie asks the right questions: project type, garden size, budget, timeline, commercial vs residential, design vs maintenance. She identifies emergencies like storm damage and marks them as urgent priority.

03

Garden Project Alert in 3 Seconds

A structured message lands on your phone: name, number, postcode, project details, budget, urgency, and estimated value. Tap Accept, Call Back, or Decline. Customer gets an instant SMS either way.

See the full process in detail

Questions Landscapers Ask

Everything you need to know about AI call answering for landscaping businesses.

How much does AI call answering cost for landscapers?

whoza.ai starts at £59/month for the Starter plan. That's less than one small garden maintenance job. You get unlimited AI call answering, WhatsApp delivery, and a 7-day free trial with no credit card required. Most landscapers recover the cost within a week by capturing just one missed enquiry.

Can Katie handle commercial landscaping enquiries?

Absolutely. Katie is trained to identify commercial enquiries from estates, hotels, property developers, councils, schools, and office complexes. She captures contract details, site addresses, project scope, and budget ranges — then marks these as priority in your WhatsApp alert. Commercial clients are your biggest repeat customer base, so Katie makes sure you never miss them.

What information does Katie collect from landscaping customers?

Katie captures: full name, phone number, postcode, project type (garden design, maintenance, patio, decking, fencing, turfing, tree surgery, etc.), garden size, budget range, timeline, property type (residential/commercial), design vs maintenance preference, and how they found you. For emergencies, she also asks about storm damage extent and urgency level.

Will customers know they're talking to AI?

Katie introduces herself as your digital assistant with a natural, professional voice. Most callers appreciate the instant response over voicemail or a ringing phone. In user surveys, 89% of callers are satisfied with the AI experience — they just want their garden project started fast.

Does it work with my existing business phone number?

Yes. You simply set up call forwarding from your existing landscaping business number to your whoza.ai number. Your customers dial the same number they've always used — Katie just answers when you can't. Setup takes under 10 minutes.

How quickly can I get set up?

Most landscapers are live and capturing calls within 30 minutes. Sign up, connect your number via call forwarding, set your greeting and business details, and Katie starts answering immediately. No hardware, no IT team, no technical knowledge required.

Can Katie handle emergency storm damage calls?

Yes. Katie answers 24/7 including nights, weekends, and bank holidays. She identifies emergency keywords like 'storm damage', 'fallen tree', 'flooding', and 'dangerous branches' — then marks the enquiry as emergency priority in your WhatsApp alert. You see it immediately and can respond within minutes.

What happens if Katie can't handle a complex enquiry?

Katie is trained to recognise when a call needs human attention. For complex garden design consultations or unusual projects, she takes a detailed message and flags it for your immediate callback. You receive the full context in WhatsApp so you can call back prepared with all the details.

Still have questions? Read our complete AI call answering guide or compare all pricing plans.
